category_sources: Official Faust site and documentation present Faust as a language for audio DSP and signal processing.
source_facts.description says Faust is a functional programming language for real-time signal processing.
display_name_sources: Official Faust website uses the Faust name.
docs_sources: Official Faust documentation site is faustdoc.grame.fr.
Official Faust homepage is the main project site.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/grame-cncm/faust, so repo is intentionally not re-determined.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies functional programming and real-time signal processing.
source_facts.executables lists faust compiler and many faust2* command-line tools.
